title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine, reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A leader-doer who collaborates with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years directly aligns with 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech expertise fits Finout's domain, proven track record scaling GTM operations and revenue analytics, deep Salesforce admin capability, and Tel Aviv location preference enables seamless HQ collaboration.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed Finout is building out its RevOps function to scale beyond $30M ARR—exactly the inflection point where operational rigor separates market leaders from the rest. With your 15+ years scaling GTM engines in B2B SaaS and deep Salesforce expertise, you've likely seen how cloud-native companies struggle with cost visibility the way Finout solves it. Given your Tel Aviv base and the hybrid setup, this feels like a natural fit to build the operational backbone the CRO needs.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. You'll architect the territory framework, manage operating cadence, support cross-functional GTM initiatives, and partner with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions. Requires strong cross-functional collaboration, comfort with ambiguity in a fast-paced environment, and the ability to redesign territory models for global scalability. Salary range $149,000-$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise and GTM strategy background. Territory strategy, pipeline optimization, and cross-functional sales operations are core RevOps competencies, and Gong's scale and AI-native platform match his ideal company profile perfectly.
ai_opener: Omri here—your Territory Strategy & Operations mandate caught my attention because it's exactly where RevOps creates the most leverage. I've spent 15+ years architecting GTM strategies and territory models that scaled revenue across market segments, and I'm impressed by how Gong is building intelligence into the sales motion itself. I'd love to explore how we could apply that same data-driven rigor to optimize your territory compositions and seller productivity.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: Warp's first Revenue Operations Manager will work across Sales, Marketing, Growth, and Product to make the funnel predictable, efficient, and scalable. You'll inherit a stack built by a fractional RevOps agency, own it, and level it up. Requires 4-8+ years at B2B SaaS orgs, ideally with a PLG motion and enterprise sales, hands-on ownership of a CRM and core funnel workflows (routing, lifecycle stages, pipeline hygiene, automation), and the ability to diagnose funnel issues fast and ship pragmatic fixes without a big team.
score_reason: Excellent match: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience significantly exceeds 4-8 year requirement, strong RevOps core competencies (CRM, pipeline, automation, funnel diagnostics), and remote US/Canada role aligns with location preferences. Only minor gap: no explicit PLG background mentioned, but senior GTM experience compensates.
ai_opener: Omri—I noticed Warp is building out its first RevOps function after working with a fractional agency, and you need someone who can own the stack and ship fast without leaning on a big team. With 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps and a track record diagnosing and fixing funnel bottlenecks across sales, marketing, and product, I think you'd find value in exploring whether this role is the right next step. Happy to chat about how you're thinking about the PLG + enterprise motion and what's broken in your funnel right now.

title: GTM Systems & Performance Manager

You'll evaluate, improve, and rationalize the systems and workflows supporting Sales and the broader GTM motion, maintaining a clear view of the GTM ecosystem.
